creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Fix pkg-plist.
Manpages (man1) are installed to ${PREFIX}/man/man1, not ${PREFIX}/tinderbox/scripts/man/man1.

Port maintainer (itetcu@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

--- cited log begins here ---
% make install
Installing man pages ...
cd /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/tinderbox/work/tinderbox-3.0.0/man/man1 && install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 tc-configCcache.1 tc-configDistfile.1 tc-configGet.1  tc-configJail.1 tc-configTinderd.1 tc-init.1 /usr/local/man/man1 &&  cd /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/tinderbox/work/tinderbox-3.0.0 && /bin/rm -r /usr/ports/works/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/tinderbox/work/tinderbox-3.0.0/man
...

% make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for ports-mgmt/tinderbox
===>   Deinstalling tinderbox-3.0.0_1
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/tinderbox/scripts/man/man1' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/tinderbox/scripts/man/man1'
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/tinderbox/scripts/man' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/tinderbox/scripts/man'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/tinderbox/scripts'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
incorrectly specified?)
--- cited log ends here ---
